Defines the JSON schema for a Pebble application project.

# Purpose
The JSON content defines a schema for a Pebble application project. It specifies the schema version using the `$schema` key, which points to the JSON Schema Draft 4. The `title` and `description` provide a human-readable name and description for the schema. The `type` key indicates that the data structure is an object. The `$ref` key references an external schema definition located in `file_types.json` under the path `/package-json`, which provides additional structure and validation rules for the JSON object.
